subcodes.first_line: The manner of the martyrdom of Qurratu'l-Ayn was that they informed her that the wife of the Grand Vizier desired to meet with her in the garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کیفیة شهادة قرة ‌العین هو انهم اخبروها ان زوجة‌الصدر الاعظم تحب ان تلاقیها فی البستان
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution
